message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate simple constants to exprToValue + emitZigValue

Phase 1 of builder migration: Use structured ZigValue path for
int, float, string, bool, none constants in genExpr.

- exprToValue returns typed ZigValue (certain_int, certain_float, etc.)
- emitZigValue emits the value using builder's type-aware emission
- Excludes bytes (buffering issues with captureExpr)
- Excludes bigint, complex (complex dispatch logic)

This establishes the pattern for migrating more expression types
to use the builder's type-aware emission.
